{{Quote|We attempted to capture the Eagle in a raid on Tholatin. We found a base, but the man had moved on.|Watcher Two|<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Tholatin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tholatin system/Legends|Tholatin system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the location of [[Esau's Ridge]], a thin crevasse in a towering rock wall inhabited by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. The planet's chief of security was [[Plaan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. Tholatin was conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] some [[Time/Legends|time]] during the latter's onslaught into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The planet was [[Time/Legends|eventually]] [[Battle of Tholatin|liberated]] from the invaders by the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] under [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].
